title: ononis reclinata var. inclusa
intro: Ononis reclinata var. inclusa, also known as the Inclusa Burn Clover or Burn Clover, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family and native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, burns, and skin conditions, due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Ononis reclinata var. inclusa is often used to make ointments, infusions, and decoctions that can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
